5 So the 2000 years between advents turns out to be an imitation of reality, a spurious interpolation: Satan extends his reign or as long as he can, but like his world, even its duration is fake. This is a serious matter inasmuch as virtually all of us have fallen asleep. If we are asleep when he returns we will miss him.
